runtimePhilosophy.mission: Directional intelligence exists to improve awareness quality for Gridly Know Before You Go.
runtimePhilosophy.nonNavigationBoundary: Directional intelligence must not become navigation, turn guidance, routing instruction, or user-facing NB/SB/EB/WB display without later authorization.
runtimePhilosophy.subordinationRule: Any future runtime prototype remains subordinate to awareness safety, protected-system boundaries, county containment, and fail-closed behavior.

runtimeEligibleArtifacts: validated strong-confidence, county-owned, corridor-valid, non-review, non-bearing-only candidate records derived from V684/V685/V686R/V688 evidence after a future authorization gate
runtimeDataArchitecture.currentMilestoneBehavior: V694 creates architecture evidence only and does not load any directional data into runtime.

reviewBucketIsolationArchitecture.hardExclusionModel: A record with any review bucket, review reason, manual-review marker, reversible/construction/HOV-HOT signal, missing county, missing oneway, or missing ref is excluded before runtime candidate set construction.
reviewBucketIsolationArchitecture.escapeHandling: Any review-bucket escape attempt invalidates the full candidate set and returns no directional intelligence.

candidateLifecycle: no user-facing output unless separately authorized

countyContainmentArchitecture.model: County-aware runtime containment owns each candidate by exactly one valid county and prevents cross-county mixing.
countyContainmentArchitecture.enforcement: Missing, ambiguous, invalid, or mismatched county ownership blocks the candidate and invalidates the runtime candidate set for the affected county scope.

runtimeSafetyArchitecture.downgradePath: Any confidence, containment, or audit regression downgrades to no directional intelligence.
runtimeSafetyArchitecture.rollbackPath: Remove candidate asset reference and return protected runtime layer to no directional intelligence.
runtimeSafetyArchitecture.containmentFailureResponse: Block affected scope, emit audit failure, and display nothing.
runtimeSafetyArchitecture.reviewBucketEscapeResponse: Invalidate candidate set, emit audit failure, and display nothing.
runtimeSafetyArchitecture.confidenceRegressionResponse: Demote affected records to review/offline status and display nothing.

futurePrototypeDefinition.smallestPrototype: A non-user-facing, county-contained, fail-closed, audit-visible runtime candidate dry-run that excludes all review buckets and produces no labels or UI.
